series_metadata.series_description: Records that document the election proceedings of the Ohio Vendors Representative Committee (OVRC). Records may include: completed ballots; return envelopes; ballot tally sheet; and, any additional record generated during the election and ballot review.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Maintain documents election results are declared and new or re-elected member(s) have accepted position(s). when no longer of administrative value. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: Maintain documents election results are declared and new or re-elected member(s) have accepted position(s). when no longer of administrative value. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records
